author: CWCHAN8
title: Playback problems
content:
I stored my FLAC files in iCloud drive.
For playing some specific FLAC files,
when they reach specific time,
they will go to the next song automatically.
It should be a bug.
Please fix it.

author: DaddyBigCat
title: Crashing all the way
content: When connecting to home NAS via SMB all the time crashing, occasionally can browse the folder, but when navigating, crash again.  Suggest more sophisticated testing before publishing.  If there is no such crashing that can be a great player that worth paying to own

author: αg
title: Bug?
content: Don’t know why it skipped every song and not playing.

author: Socoolno
title: Superb.
content: Superb multi function player for network, cloud and local music. Love its tag editor and seamless and stable file download/upload/move capability across cloud, network and local storage. More than a music player,a must have app for serious music lovers Who actively organize, update and play music files from different storage platforms. Adding stereo or multi speakers synchronized play would definitely earn another plus.

author: SamHK20150222
title: Good if bug fixed
content:
Want to pay before I find the following problem
Cannot play song from control center.
I don’t know why it often stop playing song in playlist with earphone and chrome cast to my LG sound bar
Give five stars and pay if bug fix

author: GLworks
title: Flacbox with iPhone by true wireless headphones
content: This is a pretty good apps to listen your favourite music with true wireless headphones. It has a very helpful equaliser to fine tune the base.

author: wkmmu
title: Nice app sync music without iTunes
content:
Still, there are two minor problems.
1. when click the next song, sometimes it cannot load the next song until restart the app
2.  the "play all" button in music library tab always play the first song in the list instead of playing a random one
